mapper.select: /* 대시보드 상단 통계 카드 dashboard.selectStatSummary */ WITH LOG_BASE AS ( SELECT A.CREATE_DT , A.SATIS_YN FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 ) , DATA1 AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS DATA_VAL FROM TB_INQ WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ) , DATA2 AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS DATA_VAL FROM LOG_BASE WHERE CREATE_DT >= CURDATE() AND CREATE_DT < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) , DATA3 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SATIS_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(SATIS_YN), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM LOG_BASE WHERE SATIS_YN IS NOT NULL ) , DATA4 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SATIS_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(SATIS_YN), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM LOG_BASE WHERE SATIS_YN IS NOT NULL ) SELECT DATA1.DATA_VAL AS FEEDBACK_COUNT , DATA2.DATA_VAL AS TODAY_QUERY_COUNT , DATA3.DATA_VAL AS SATISFACTION_RATE , DATA4.DATA_VAL AS DISSATISFACTION_RATE FROM DATA1, DATA2, DATA3, DATA4

/* 대시보드 질의 비율 dashboard.selectQueryRatio */ WITH BASE AS ( SELECT A.SVC_TY FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 ) , DATA1 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SVC_TY = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM BASE ) , DATA2 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SVC_TY = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM BASE ) , DATA3 AS ( SELECT CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SVC_TY = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS DATA_VAL FROM BASE ) SELECT DATA1.DATA_VAL AS LLM , DATA2.DATA_VAL AS RAG , DATA3.DATA_VAL AS TEXT_TO_SQL FROM DATA1, DATA2, DATA3

/* 대시보드 공지 요약 목록 dashboard.selectDashboardNoticeList */ SELECT A.NOTICE_ID , CONCAT('[', C.CODE_NM, '] ', A.TITLE) AS TITLE , A.FEATURED_YN , A.CRTR_ID , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_NOTICE A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON A.NOTICE_TYPE_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'NT000001' WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.FEATURED_YN DESC , A.CREATE_DT DESC LIMIT 4

/* 대시보드 토큰 사용량 목록 dashboard.selectTokenUsageList */ WITH RECURSIVE MONTHS AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS YM UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(YM, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') FROM MONTHS WHERE YM < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') ) , TOKEN_LMT AS ( SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT A.MON_ORG_LMT FROM TB_TOKEN_LMT A ORDER BY A.MODIFY_DT DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS MON_ORG_LMT ) , TOKEN_SUM AS ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-01') AS YM , SUM(IFNULL(A.IN_TOKENS, 0) + IFNULL(A.OUT_TOKENS, 0)) AS TOKEN_USAGE FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE A.CREATE_DT >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND A.CREATE_DT < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-01') ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(M.YM, '%Y년 %m월') AS YM , IFNULL(TS.TOKEN_USAGE, 0) AS TOKEN_USAGE , TL.MON_ORG_LMT , CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(IFNULL(TS.TOKEN_USAGE, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(TL.MON_ORG_LMT, 0), 2), 0) AS DECIMAL(7,2)) AS USAGE_RATE FROM MONTHS M LEFT JOIN TOKEN_SUM TS ON M.YM = TS.YM CROSS JOIN TOKEN_LMT TL ORDER BY M.YM

/* 대시보드 사용자 추이 dashboard.selectVisitorTrendList */ WITH RECURSIVE DAYS AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 10 DAY) AS DT UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(DT, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM DAYS WHERE DT < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) , LOGIN_SUM AS ( SELECT A.STAT_DATE , SUM(IFNULL(A.SUCCESS_CNT, 0)) AS SUCCESS_CNT FROM TB_AUDIT_LOGIN_DAILY_STAT A WHERE A.STAT_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AND A.STAT_DATE <= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY A.STAT_DATE ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(D.DT, '%c/%e') AS STAT_DATE , IFNULL(L.SUCCESS_CNT, 0) AS SUCCESS_CNT FROM DAYS D LEFT JOIN LOGIN_SUM L ON DATE_FORMAT(D.DT, '%Y%m%d') = L.STAT_DATE ORDER BY D.DT
